title: ferulago sandrasica
intro: Ferulago sandrasica, also known as Turkish angelica or Turkish angelica root, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Turkey. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of ferulic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ferulago sandrasica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Ferulago sandrasica is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in dried or fresh form for various herbal remedies.
